
### things symbolic exec good/bad at  {.smaller}


* good:
* <i>if know where input comes from</i>, exploring most code paths input code trigger
* if particular code path targetted,
* bad:
* handling large inputs/codebases/functions 

   * lots of memory + compute usage for modestly sized code
   * need to keep drive away from ‘useless’ paths

* handling variable-sized data (symbolic write issue) 

   * better for variants using higher-level representation with machine code
